name: loom
description: Loom agent entry plus six precision rituals
prompt: Universal Loom floor: Ordinary prompts remain normal agent mode; apply lazy discipline, trust/safety/privacy/secrets/data-loss/accessibility care, never auto-merge/publish, and existing .loom issues marked done require an APPROVE Verify signal. Choosing the Loom agent/skill is explicit entry: load the registered loom skill, which is the canonical dispatcher. Precision loom-* skills remain direct entries.
